governance_decision.reason: Rows belong to TCG Pocket-like source IDs and were previously policy-blocked from public physical GV-ID backfill. Current sets still have pokemon_eng_standard identity defaults, so applying physical enrichment would mix non-physical rows into the English physical canon.
allowed_future_work: guarded dry-run for set/card_print domain reclassification only after contract approval
forbidden_without_new_contract: card_prints.set_code or number backfill as English physical
GV-ID minting under public physical namespace
deletion or cleanup of dependency-bearing rows

expected_scope_if_later_approved: card_prints.identity_domain for rows in those sets
active identity domain handling or deactivation strategy only with explicit contract
required_before_dry_run: active identity uniqueness plan for non-physical domain
rollback proof for set and parent domain fields
